name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA LAUNCHES TO REGISTER, ENGAGE, AND MOBILIZE VOTERS AHEAD OF 2022 AND BEYOND
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, FEBRUARY 22, 2021
GREATER GEORGIA LAUNCHES TO REGISTER, ENGAGE, AND MOBILIZE VOTERS AHEAD OF 2022 AND BEYOND
ATLANTA - Today, former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler announced the launch of Greater Georgia Action, Inc. ("Greater Georgia"), a non-profit organization focused on registering new voters, engaging more communities, and strengthening election transparency and uniformity across the state. Following Democrat wins in both the 2020 presidential election and 2021 Senate runoff elections in Georgia, Greater Georgia's mission is to strengthen our democracy by enabling the voices of more voters across the state to be heard and advance pro-growth policies that improve the lives of all Georgians.
Loeffler will serve as Chairwoman and bring her experience from decades in business, her work in the Senate, and firsthand knowledge of Georgia as a statewide candidate to build an unprecedented organization that expands voter engagement, promotes conservative values, and supports better election outcomes. Greater Georgia is a registered 501(c)(4) and is a candidate-neutral organization. Loeffler will donate her time and launch Greater Georgia with a personal seven-figure financial commitment, backed by a staff with extensive field, fundraising, and election operations experience.
"Our state is greater - and our democracy is stronger - when everyone's voice is heard, and that's exactly what Greater Georgia's work is about," said Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "But for too many in our state, the importance - and even the sanctity of their vote - is in question. That's why we're rolling up our sleeves to register conservative-leaning voters who have been overlooked, to regularly engage more communities, and to strengthen election integrity across our state. Elections at every level have consequences - and we're already seeing the consequences of recent elections play out in Georgia and across the country. Conservatives have a winning message, we just need to go out and share it with more people. By registering new voters, broadening our outreach, and rebuilding trust in our election process, we can create better outcomes, strengthen our democracy, and lift up more voices in our state."
Greater Georgia's mission is based on three integrated efforts that create a flywheel effect: Registering and engaging more voters, reaching more communities and expanding existing networks, and strengthening election transparency and uniformity. Greater Georgia's focus is to create better election outcomes by advancing a pro-growth, conservative message that protects our freedoms and creates more opportunities for all Georgians.
Registering and Engaging More Voters
Georgia is a growing, diverse state, but we know millions of voting-age residents are still not registered to vote - many of whom support the conservative values of protecting individual liberties, lower taxes, better jobs, educational choice, public safety, and affordable healthcare. By identifying and engaging these conservative-leaning Georgians and registering them to vote, their voices can be heard on the issues that directly impact their lives and contribute to a stronger future for Georgia.
Reaching More Communities and Expanding Existing Networks
Registering more voters is only one part of this effort. Reaching more communities and building, engaging, and sustaining an enduring network is crucial to successful election and policy outcomes. But growing and sustaining support also requires a continuous dialogue to mobilize support - not just in an election year. By listening and by standing up for our shared values, communicating our positive vision, and delivering results that lift up communities across the state, we put the people of Georgia, their freedoms, and their opportunities first.
Strengthening Election Transparency and Uniformity
Ensuring more voices are heard also requires that voters have confidence in the process. Trusted elections are the bedrock of our democracy and should not be a partisan issue. We are focused on building a sustainable platform and the operational infrastructure to instill transparency and uniformity in our election process. Georgia voters deserve to have confidence that their voices are heard when they cast their ballot.
The flywheel of dedicated engagement, advocacy, and trusted elections will help preserve our democracy for generations to come. Greater Georgia will be actively engaging with voters across the state through community engagement, roundtables, and participating in a consistent calendar of events.
More details will be announced in the coming days and weeks.
To learn more, visit [www.greatergeorgia.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dCxUIIITuXCcC2tDA-bvdgcRujtN3zHbf1cxe7aPVCnhO0luvFM9Hl_suWr95XVIXzjhwetQQVuNMW1IoT5ENvYK8d0DBnYjW099u6S2wdidKwZeE84KY7V4hcEIoDR3hfJdnSkUiXbUZ8-T-7llBw==&c=dd5YtDsLpyBAq2j9sC8DOFx9DYkpiwIALxNxwMkrT7ZWtV1oefCjmw==&ch=jRIvM9_qHyHliamuwOosZ2F9jhIzkoMCxnRnpk0dcs1dd2FAk5gyJg==), and follow along on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dCxUIIITuXCcC2tDA-bvdgcRujtN3zHbf1cxe7aPVCnhO0luvFM9Hl_suWr95XVIFGSfZu36gQu4NBVS5Xep8DJqy7LkBEUFBOHp7tJYf_TfqVgTJpjQ2oCmExgozM_QUQ9radXOrM845HViVY6y2DmdjxncwgJH8LZhjW1k18g=&c=dd5YtDsLpyBAq2j9sC8DOFx9DYkpiwIALxNxwMkrT7ZWtV1oefCjmw==&ch=jRIvM9_qHyHliamuwOosZ2F9jhIzkoMCxnRnpk0dcs1dd2FAk5gyJg==), [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dCxUIIITuXCcC2tDA-bvdgcRujtN3zHbf1cxe7aPVCnhO0luvFM9Hl_suWr95XVIyJHTk6UXJW0_dgZIirUC1vpFQdou78SLv5DMxOcPGhIzvp80u6E6izZyZzEJwLOkztfgBYHvcnMIDzv0UEGuK3dFg8flCDYY&c=dd5YtDsLpyBAq2j9sC8DOFx9DYkpiwIALxNxwMkrT7ZWtV1oefCjmw==&ch=jRIvM9_qHyHliamuwOosZ2F9jhIzkoMCxnRnpk0dcs1dd2FAk5gyJg==), and [Instagram](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dCxUIIITuXCcC2tDA-bvdgcRujtN3zHbf1cxe7aPVCnhO0luvFM9Hl_suWr95XVIIdjSGTiS-FOM5pXB6xy3pRfvEbazZV3yAUyc9TPFGhxJgZxODotNIPESzvXJkE_8cxCArycpVNWyr7gN7tNZI_echsIane-b&c=dd5YtDsLpyBAq2j9sC8DOFx9DYkpiwIALxNxwMkrT7ZWtV1oefCjmw==&ch=jRIvM9_qHyHliamuwOosZ2F9jhIzkoMCxnRnpk0dcs1dd2FAk5gyJg==) to stay up to date with the latest information.

body:
We are about to face a border crisis. Right now our southern border is facing a huge influx of illegal migrants

Friend,

Liz Cheney has joined Republican colleagues to demand action from the Biden administration but they need your support!

Friend, it's no secret the Democrats will spend millions of dollars to flip this district from red to blue in 2022. They spent $11 million dollars last year and will certainly spend even more next time around. The Far Left opponent we defeated in November has already declared a rematch at the polls. **But we 've got a message for him: Michelle won last time and she can do it again.**

That's where you come in. We need YOUR support to stand up against the Democrat dark money machine. Even Nancy Pelosi's hand-picked candidate was no match for the voters of this district. California's 48th district saw through the Democrats' dark money and socialist agenda and decided enough was enough. But that won't stop the Far Left from spending even more money next time. clean_body: It's no secret the Democrats will spend millions of dollars to flip this district from red to blue in 2022. ** . == Friend, it's no secret the Democrats will spend millions of dollars to flip this district from red to blue in 2022. They spent $11 million dollars last year and will certainly spend even more next time around. The Far Left opponent we defeated in November has already declared a rematch at the polls. But we 've got a message for him: Michelle won last time and she can do it again. That's where you come in. We need YOUR support to stand up against the Democrat dark money machine. == == | == The future of the House Majority hinges on whether or not we can hold this seat -- a seat we just recently flipped from BLUE to RED. Even Nancy Pelosi's hand-picked candidate was no match for the voters of this district. California's 48th district saw through the Democrats' dark money and socialist agenda and decided enough was enough. But that won't stop the Far Left from spending even more money next time. That's why your support TODAY for Michelle is so important. ==** Michelle is continuing her pledge to stand up for California's taxpayers and fight against new taxes and tax increases. With your help, she can keep working for you. == Thank you, Team Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Bill Olson
subject: 53 bad executive orders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hUo7UgTqgL8vIic&b=Tsk4wLE49ozzU03uf2YmAA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hUo7UgTqgL8vIic&b=Tsk4wLE49ozzU03uf2YmAA
- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by liberal Congressman Darren Soto.

I am furious with Joe Biden. He is a LIAR!

The fraudulent Biden does not have a strong majority in Congress- only 5 seats. That means he can't get all these horrendous policies through Congress (even with several RINO votes, as we now know).

So, Biden has resorted to issuing more executive orders than any President in history in his opening weeks- 53, so far.

As a reminder, Biden himself declared in 2019 that "Only a Dictator legislates through executive orders!"

Image

secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st

And why is Biden is such a hurry to legislate through executive orders?

I don't believe Biden is of sound mind- he will simply sign whatever is put before him. He can't get any of this crazy stuff through Congress.

It is up to us as America First conservatives to stop him NOW. If the RINO leadership in DC won't take Biden to court to challenge his illegal executive orders, then we must retake Congress and undo them by legislation.

So you are aware, here are some of Biden's "greatest hits":

Incorporating undocumented immigrants into census

Refocusing on the climate crisis and canceling the Keystone XL permit

Pulling funds from border wall

Reversing transgender military ban

Revising immigration enforcement policies

Rejoining the Paris Agreement on climate chang

That is but a few. He is also considering gun control, and new taxes on ammo. This Manchurian Dictator must be stopped!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hUo7UgTqgL8vIic&b=Tsk4wLE49ozzU03uf2YmAA

There is no alternative. I will help retake Congress and push the America First agenda- enshrine it into law so tinpot dictator Biden can't use his precious executive orders against us.

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and coming close. This time I'm starting early so I'll have the money to do even better!

Darren Soto hates the President and does not vote in the interest of the people of Central Florida. He lets Biden do whatever Harris wants him to. I'll stand up to them all!

I am an America First patriot, and I will vote with the Constitution- and against questionable executive orders!

Biden is lawless. I will not let him get away with destroying our country by fiat! Canyou help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hUo7UgTqgL8vIic&b=Tsk4wLE49ozzU03uf2YmAA

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hUo7UgTqgL8vIic&b=Tsk4wLE49ozzU03uf2YmAA
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2900 per individual, $5800 per couple? Let's send Biden and Harris a message they will not soon forget!

I can beat them - with your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hUo7UgTqgL8vIic&b=Tsk4wLE49ozzU03uf2YmAA

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hUo7UgTqgL8vIic&b=Tsk4wLE49ozzU03uf2YmAA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hUo7UgTqgL8vIic&b=Tsk4wLE49ozzU03uf2YmAA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hUo7UgTqgL8vIic&b=Tsk4wLE49ozzU03uf2YmAA
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: Tim Scott
subject: Should my story be heard?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
They don't want you to hear my family's story of going from cotton to Congress in one lifetime. They don't want you to know about how I grew up in a single parent household and worked my way to where I am today. They don't want you to hear about my story because it goes against everything the Democrats say is wrong with America.
Friend,

Since being elected, the Democrats and their media allies have done everything they can to try to erase my American story. **You see, Friend, the far Left feels threatened by me.**

➡️ Democrats raised $200,000 in 24 hours to start their fight to unseat Young.

➡️ The Far Left has already spent over $20 million to take back this seat.

Martin

Friend,

I wanted to personally reach out to you today to let you know about my vision for our great state: to make Arkansas first.

The way I see it, Arkansas could be first in everything from education to job creation to manufacturing, all while staying true to our values.**And I know that together, we can make that vision a reality.**

Friend, we can't do any of this without YOUR HELP. body:
Senate Democrats decided to go right along with the Biden-Harris Administration's amnesty and open borders policy.
Friend, this will fuel a never-ending cycle of illegal immigration.

Senate Democrats decided to go right along with the Biden-Harris Administration's amnesty and open borders policy.

11 million illegal immigrants will be granted amnesty faster than any other legislation has offered in recent history. Not to mention this will also hurt the immigrants working through the legal immigration process.
**BORDER WALL PETITION**

I was fully endorsed by President Trump after I walked away from the Democrat Party and officially became the Republican Congressman for New Jersey's 2nd Congressional District.
**New Jersey Democrats have continuously tried to label me as a "traitor" for defending President Trump's AMERICA-FIRST agenda in Congress. **
Well, here's what the far-left needs to know, Friend.
**I will NEVER give up fighting for hard-working middle-class families in South Jersey, and I will ALWAYS defend the America-First agenda and all of its accomplishments.**

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Vaccinations now available for Rhode Islanders 65 and older
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Starting today, all Rhode Islanders 65 years old or older are eligible to get the COVID-19 vaccine. If you're in that age group, you can schedule your appointment at one of the three types of vaccination clinics.
1) State-run vaccination sites: Book your appointment online at [VaccinateRI.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R9qs3YlDb04ObY-ghw-QtCcScaBMsRUa7OK93y0f98hgA5mc01J8RYZ2-TLuLJptnRNO-ro6IjpMIA07xxYBgDJXklv2_Fb-o2WiCKoxCCvA4WtJgWlkgOODzFd3TVmHdlgvStBtsyF08pW-_UtOvg==&c=k_o4y4wJcnEgd5yeSwxbGpcy8D5SbIsCpER6IGbdj77V1eJY1FJn3w==&ch=tV-MUHHip_4MC2Kq80oHnk7W4exnwbU7bhdoMOG1U1mcP4RaJgV1Fg==) or by calling 844-930-1779. 2) Municipal sites: Contact your municipal government using their website or phone number, which you can find [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R9qs3YlDb04ObY-ghw-QtCcScaBMsRUa7OK93y0f98hgA5mc01J8RXau4EdtmAK15a0C0f4rW7mLusxUCE-vEEBbXS3q9Xa8YQQfn73weSlZuEChy_kGla1eB_O82nLW2A_NjjfarS8jBnoyGK-zCdgOTKNxeM2n5Oalxs6nD_XKbL45sNU9r_jzIshCyFnnNsz0fYD9xJnpwOX71sDJIQ==&c=k_o4y4wJcnEgd5yeSwxbGpcy8D5SbIsCpER6IGbdj77V1eJY1FJn3w==&ch=tV-MUHHip_4MC2Kq80oHnk7W4exnwbU7bhdoMOG1U1mcP4RaJgV1Fg==). 3) Pharmacies: To schedule an appointment through a pharmacy visit [CVS.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R9qs3YlDb04ObY-ghw-QtCcScaBMsRUa7OK93y0f98hgA5mc01J8RXL9y3Waeo6Xcpc5NUltFYn9dqV_hCVY4m99KJB2vcJiteuNqTR11qcS6a2d2dGlkcf8j7d7BgIadWRZM6Jm7nc=&c=k_o4y4wJcnEgd5yeSwxbGpcy8D5SbIsCpER6IGbdj77V1eJY1FJn3w==&ch=tV-MUHHip_4MC2Kq80oHnk7W4exnwbU7bhdoMOG1U1mcP4RaJgV1Fg==) or [Walgreens.com/ScheduleVaccine](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R9qs3YlDb04ObY-ghw-QtCcScaBMsRUa7OK93y0f98hgA5mc01J8RYZ2-TLuLJptqg9riSLEhAA17Q585UAxOAaEhtxmq2K8z0-1czQeAtGicbIoLjlaoHIpOKYtxkrADZaMk0zDbsdfRxOiVlbUC5FtWYY3kW1M&c=k_o4y4wJcnEgd5yeSwxbGpcy8D5SbIsCpER6IGbdj77V1eJY1FJn3w==&ch=tV-MUHHip_4MC2Kq80oHnk7W4exnwbU7bhdoMOG1U1mcP4RaJgV1Fg==).
---
|
---
| I'm grateful to our National Guard and to the Rhode Island Department of Health for their incredible work in launching Phase 2 of our vaccination campaign. Because of their work over the last few months, we're now in a position to rapidly distribute vaccines at centralized locations to Rhode Islanders across the state.
I have another piece of good news to share. Phase 1 of the campaign focused on vaccinating our highest-risk populations: health care workers, Rhode Islanders in nursing homes and other congregate care settings, older Rhode Islanders, and Rhode Islanders in high-density communities. As a result, we've seen our hospitalizations drop more quickly than our neighboring states and the national average. Because of that improvement, today we announced that we will be closing both of our field hospitals. Out of an abundance of caution, we're going to keep the equipment in place to treat a potential surge. But as it stands today, our existing hospital infrastructure is more than capable of handling the current pace of COVID-19 patients.
This is a sign of the enormous effort and sacrifices that all Rhode Islanders have made over the last few months. Thank you, and let's keep going. If we continue to wear a mask, get tested often, and get vaccinated when eligible, we're going to get through this.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
|
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

subject: Have you seen this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004
body:
****
Help defend our elections

************
Easier to vote, harder to cheat. That's what Republicans in the states are striving to achieve.
But the radical left is trying to stop us.
Free, open, and fair elections should be something all Americans want, but unfortunately, that's not always the case.
That's why we need your help. We need as many Americans as possible to add their names, and pledge to become an official Election Defender. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: RoKhanna.com
subject: We have to face the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
There are still sitting members of Congress who helped incite the violence of the Capitol last month. One of those members, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Green, lost her committee assignments because of it.
#
We can’t hide from the facts.
There are still sitting members of Congress who helped incite the violence of the Capitol last month. _One of those members, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Green, lost her committee assignments because of it._
**We have to take a multifaceted approach to fighting against the hate still present on Capitol Hill.** First, we have to continue to advance progressive legislation with our new majority to reverse the damage from the last four years of the Republican majority. Second, we must work with Ro to overcome these members’ hate and continue to hold them accountable.
**To do that, we need your support to make sure Ro can keep working in Congress to do everything we can against leaders, like Marjorire Taylor Greene, and their dangerous agendas.[Can you make a donation right now to keep up this work?](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6050?refcode=ema-1651&t=20&akid=1651%2E946728%2Eix3zJR)**
**[Contribute](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6050?refcode=em-1651&amounts=&t=21&akid=1651%2E946728%2Eix3zJR)**
The attack on the Capitol was one of the darkest days in American history — and there are still people holding the honor of a seat in Congress who still support the challenging of election results and the insurrection.
**As we heal as a nation, we have to remain united against this antagonism.** We have to remain focused on our plan to bring about meaningful, lasting change with progressive policies we have been working towards for years.
**[Make a contribution of wherever you can afford today so we can stay focused and keep up our work to fight for our progressive values.](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6050?refcode=ema-1651&t=22&akid=1651%2E946728%2Eix3zJR)**
Together,
Team Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-khanna?refcode=emfooter20210222&t=23&refcode2=1651_946728_ix3zJR&akid=1651%2E946728%2Eix3zJR)** | [](https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
---|---|---
Paid for by Ro for Congress
PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto:info@rokhanna.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we stay in touch with you, but if you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1651%2E946728%2Eix3zJR).

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: David Perdue is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello --
Last month, my friend Reverend Raphael Warnock won in Georgia, securing our Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate. His historic victory represented the best of America -- a country dedicated to progress, inclusion, and delivering change for hard-working families.
**But our Senate majority is in trouble.** Republicans are already hard at work to defeat Senator Reverend Warnock, myself, and other vulnerable Democrats. Just last week, former GOP Senator David Perdue filed paperwork to run again in Georgia.
Time and time again, David Perdue let corporate special interests call the shots, putting the needs of his wealthy donors ahead of working people. If we want to protect our American values and give everyone a seat at the table, we need to keep control of the Senate.
That's why I'm asking for your support today. [**Can you please rush a $3 contribution today to defend Georgia and our Democratic majority?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc7d7/2a380d31/21593780/f06c7c/398403267/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0d2Fybm9jayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjEwMjIyX213aDRyd19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4warnock?refcode=e20210222_mwh4rw_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Raphael Warnock and Maggie Hassan._

**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc7d7/2a380d31/21593780/f06c7e/398403267/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0d2Fybm9jayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjEwMjIyX213aDRyd19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UWlCOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4warnock?refcode=e20210222_mwh4rw_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc7d7/2a380d31/21593780/f06c7f/398403267/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0d2Fybm9jayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjEwMjIyX213aDRyd19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4warnock?refcode=e20210222_mwh4rw_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc7d7/2a380d31/21593780/f06c7c/398403267/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0d2Fybm9jayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjEwMjIyX213aDRyd19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4warnock?refcode=e20210222_mwh4rw_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
This is a pivotal moment for our country. The future is bright, but we have a long road ahead to tackle this pandemic, get our economy back on track, and expand access to affordable health care.
With your help, we overcame the odds and flipped the Senate. Together, we're going to keep our Democratic majority. Thank you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues on Behalf of High School Coach Fired for Objecting to BLM/Critical Race Theory Curriculum for Daughter’s 7th Grade History Class
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it filed a federal lawsuit on behalf of David Flynn, the father of two Dedham Public School students, who was removed from his position as head football coach after exercising his right as a citizen to raise concerns about his daughter’s seventh-grade history class curriculum being changed to include biased coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and diversity.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 22, 2021

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that it filed a federal lawsuit on behalf of David Flynn, the father of two Dedham Public School students, who was removed from his position as head football coach after exercising his right as a citizen to raise concerns about his daughter’s seventh-grade history class curriculum being changed to include biased coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and diversity. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 22, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == Federal prosecutors are missing in action in a corruption probe that at one time reportedly was zeroing in on then-Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe. Mr. McAuliffe served as governor from 2014 to 2018, but was barred by Virginia law from running for a second consecutive term. He’s back now, taking another shot at the Executive Mansion. He’s raised more than $6 million for the Democratic Party’s June primary, making him the frontrunner for the nomination. == ---|--- | | | | | In January 2021, Flynn, who had been the head football coach at Dedham High School (DHS) since 2011, was called into a meeting with Welch as well as the DHS principal and athletic director. At the meeting, Welch handed Flynn one of the emails he had written to the Dedham School Committee members and informed him that one of the committee members asked Welch, “What are we going to do about this?” At the end of the meeting Flynn was told that they, “were going in adifferent direction” with the football program. ---|--- | | | | | Congress exempts itself from the Freedom of Information Act, and the Capitol Police declined to produce any records about the riot to Judicial Watch, writing in a February 11, 2021, letter that the requested emails and videos are not “public records.” ---|--- | | | | == | == The managers of last week’s impeachment trial against President Trump engaged in “a wild abuse of any sense of due process and justice,” according to Fitton. As the Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton stated,“ the House managers should be subject to ethics investigations (for) the way they handled this case.” Given that the impeachment managers were selectively pulling video clips out of context and doctoring tweets, “purposely misleading and misreading them,” Fitton argued that the impeachment managers made their case disingenuously. As Fitton argued, “the president neither morally nor legally incited any insurrection.” == ---|--- | | | = Newsmax Communist China has long benefitted from American-funded research stolen by Chinese academics who infiltrate colleges throughout the United States. This month a criminal indictment sheds light on a recent scheme allegedly masterminded by a Chinese professor at one of the nation’s top-ranked public universities. = = The Hill Biden adopted the extremist tack during his first week in office, issuing an executive order authorizing “catch and release” programs at the border, and freezing deportations. It also emerged that Customs and Border Protection (CBP) is saying that apprehended aliens are not being tested for COVID-19, potentially introducing new disease vectors into the American population at large. As such, releasing them into the country places the public health at risk, not only from COVID-19 but also, as Judicial Watch has reported, from tuberculosis, pneumonia and other health risks. = = The Daily Wire A former Massachusetts high school football coach is suing the Dedham Public School district after he was fired for privately disagreeing with the left-wing social justice curriculum being taught to his children. = = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

body:

| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2159?t=3&akid=6917%2E53494%2E7MtRT0) Friend, I've said it before, but I'll say it again: One of the most important climate policies we can fight for right now is a 100% clean electricity standard, so we can transform the U.S. power grid to run entirely on clean, carbon-free electricity by 2035. Is it possible? **Absolutely.[And this Wednesday at 1:00 p.m. ET, some of our friends in the climate movement are hosting a webinar on how we can make it happen. Click here to RSVP to Wednesday's webinar!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2159?t=4&akid=6917%2E53494%2E7MtRT0)** [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2159?t=5&akid=6917%2E53494%2E7MtRT0) During this webinar, you'll hear from leading voices in the climate movement—including Evergreen advisory board member Dr. Leah Stokes—on how we can pass a 100% clean electricity standard _this year_. **[RSVP here to get in on all the wonky fun and join Wednesday's webinar.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2159?t=6&akid=6917%2E53494%2E7MtRT0)** See you there, Rainee Taylor

name: Mark Warner for Virginia
subject: Opening our schools quickly and safely
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Here's how.
|
---

| | Derek,

Governor Northam is calling for Virginia schools to begin returning to in-person instruction next month.

To do this safely, we need to make sure our schools have the resources they need to protect students, teachers, staff, and their families.

**Mark is fighting to include more funding for schools in the new COVID-19 relief bill.[Will you sign his petition calling on Congress to help our schools open back up safely?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8c5/53d9897e/552bed30/1c88dceb/3909890059/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-schools")** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8c5/53d9897e/552bed30/1c88dceb/3909890059/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-schools")
---
We don't have to choose between opening our schools or keeping our students and teachers safe. We can do both, but Congress needs to provide schools with the resources they need to make it happen.

**[If you agree, please sign on to Mark Warner's petition.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8c5/53d9897e/552bed30/1c88dceb/3909890059/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-schools") We can get this done -- together. **

Thanks for all your help,
Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8c5/53d9897e/552bed30/1c88dcea/3909890059/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db21?refcode=20210222_p_1_fl__967__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=2d6c3bcb38714c869d8ea3b830ef89bf&_t=9gm2BV5bav4cPH4CoLXzHbZH2KpcZ0Rug9fZJ3Fj4yUPrMs2pNhtex5P5dNdBXDnDuFTnHM6E_MbIrCwBLPcGg02yYKhTfR6ONEAhFH_aMdwuA6TNpVWdgKODQeO5Fks1zNT1_wO22dar21vUxMPLOaX5TrJqX1zDPhYFO9qDPQ%3D)

**FLIP THE HOUSE PETITION:****[We have ONE day until the State of the Union Address and so far have collected 78,882 signatures of our 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 10,500 patriots to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by TOMORROW](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d6c3bcb38714c869d8ea3b830ef89bf&_e=IxyeIAH6eZUveXC2i29vweMioy7cSwfqgILad163zv5ShpUOoiVIcEqX9HH4eegTEp6WiyJ5fM-jPQkuWtSoIqMRr5Qn9GmDx7SMaYYLEaXlTtl965V4yT4SuOQ250Dhmo44OBZjijLxW-uKEVFDd-npH6GgM7uGbTxlsYgBjRjfTw4iT2NYHaq-mzDPmwtj4bxdOR85K8MiUg_CqETblnkxHccgR2G_UL9KD2uK3KHOMNmqTH6Fl0h3hUE1OcIFhpWu8M5JHSgnPcvAw6i5WfuMKRhbjQ33Mp7CcrPVtPsYnRrwxAOsqLP-ASOtf1WrprzWX8tCUIeGU6AXiJpfC5FlVhB2VqnC6ViR6P5ygnW2ab9YxOzuX1SdiqFsycKkLQRi-JED5nLPitct1BcFMpU_BaNBF9vbqHHzoAYw2wl5X4dx8T8YPudnDo2S1qvYD-ilGbX3D9Z0RdM2q73dcVy-h-PIu34jqdS2CzUL0NRR2F_V-FFUblUd5tHXDj1-)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d6c3bcb38714c869d8ea3b830ef89bf&_e=IxyeIAH6eZUveXC2i29vweMioy7cSwfqgILad163zv5ShpUOoiVIcEqX9HH4eegTEp6WiyJ5fM-jPQkuWtSoIqMRr5Qn9GmDx7SMaYYLEaXlTtl965V4yT4SuOQ250Dhmo44OBZjijLxW-uKEVFDd-npH6GgM7uGbTxlsYgBjRjfTw4iT2NYHaq-mzDPmwtj4bxdOR85K8MiUg_CqETblnkxHccgR2G_UL9KD2uK3KHOMNmqTH6Fl0h3hUE1OcIFhpWu8M5JHSgnPcvAw6i5WWxsTwbB7rQK_fal4fB81RFuum--UTdVJPsOvPhm8EPF3HZojmRSw2JXJQMStW0e8bgQxIHO386J50B0Fg3di1ecaXQ1LD8DoKmRMikw776MptoqRqmiAMgda3fDpxtZYdfIO85EHQmVQPsLPnziifCTK23hq9_QFdY5SdQoqTUOOKVeNQVv04HJptOE-JLVikF8s8Gn8XCOMq_9WVtncJiCiU1qOzXh1JkMH9HDztnq)

Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order.

In the first week of his presidency Joe Biden signed more than 40 executive orders. For a guy who campaigned on bipartisan compromise, **he’s off to a very lousy start**. So much for working with Republicans – or even his own party – in Congress!

**This is just the beginning:** in the coming weeks expect more executive orders, government madidates, economy crushing shutdowns, government spending increases and more.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in Congress to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Democrat administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d6c3bcb38714c869d8ea3b830ef89bf&_e=IxyeIAH6eZUveXC2i29vweMioy7cSwfqgILad163zv5ShpUOoiVIcEqX9HH4eegTEp6WiyJ5fM-jPQkuWtSoIqMRr5Qn9GmDx7SMaYYLEaXlTtl965V4yT4SuOQ250Dhmo44OBZjijLxW-uKEVFDd-npH6GgM7uGbTxlsYgBjRjfTw4iT2NYHaq-mzDPmwtj4bxdOR85K8MiUg_CqETblnkxHccgR2G_UL9KD2uK3KHOMNmqTH6Fl0h3hUE1OcIFhpWu8M5JHSgnPcvAw6i5WeyLbsNickP89wd8lCY9TiSsp4CEmKmfIqGJuZehdd0fBQPOaq2CaGdURyvbWPUJpx9O4s-Req3WIfwsgP-MYjpL09gcUZakxc2ngM2K5jewRG7wpd70c0DDFvaonppOLfgvX6QmgV9AVgPNsGNV7HaaIiiUA5c-4yf5Jbsy1Uq8fjb9cldZ_kOFJRKOuRO-yID9i4xMCCGFsZj9zayXhLu20wCSCDXsHn0QtYsjfjDI)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year – **it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

Before the State of the Union speech on February 23rd, **I’ve set a goal of identifying[100,000 conservatives](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d6c3bcb38714c869d8ea3b830ef89bf&_e=IxyeIAH6eZUveXC2i29vweMioy7cSwfqgILad163zv5ShpUOoiVIcEqX9HH4eegTEp6WiyJ5fM-jPQkuWtSoIqMRr5Qn9GmDx7SMaYYLEaXlTtl965V4yT4SuOQ250Dhmo44OBZjijLxW-uKEVFDd-npH6GgM7uGbTxlsYgBjRjfTw4iT2NYHaq-mzDPmwtj4bxdOR85K8MiUg_CqETblnkxHccgR2G_UL9KD2uK3KHOMNmqTH6Fl0h3hUE1OcIFhpWu8M5JHSgnPcvAw6i5WVjYg4m6LQEGOb0kajYJICb7I8qdE9fav5i6TZ_yRu7eD7nbCDdZiDYB7dzU-L5q_KljObe4fjcQYRYXPNi7wl1BGjm33BTB0GhO_DAzuGTIEbzav44U7SLMbALNnxm7HGFwyIfl-u9ZtzA8VZ0upSHG0V_-VPZajQ6plnoludLfk3scl2PsxiQUJ1KAJjGM0eaKlem59cWWrJ54_WobDnGyHu8pd5aeLLmDOcucDbtM) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have ONE day until the State of the Union Address and so far have collected 78,882 signatures of our 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 10,500 patriots to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal. **

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d6c3bcb38714c869d8ea3b830ef89bf&_e=IxyeIAH6eZUveXC2i29vweMioy7cSwfqgILad163zv5ShpUOoiVIcEqX9HH4eegTEp6WiyJ5fM-jPQkuWtSoIqMRr5Qn9GmDx7SMaYYLEaXlTtl965V4yT4SuOQ250Dhmo44OBZjijLxW-uKEVFDd-npH6GgM7uGbTxlsYgBjRjfTw4iT2NYHaq-mzDPmwtj4bxdOR85K8MiUg_CqETblnkxHccgR2G_UL9KD2uK3KHOMNmqTH6Fl0h3hUE1OcIFhpWu8M5JHSgnPcvAw6i5WWdPg5U5swQfS-uS8YKfZzWfvYgccLiqxY5b-rBEwiapMXcsIAYRAOHn2c4D56A0_AKtIjetCvLB2TbxsqcCFGgHNZBA5cA5ZB_P4nidJWb9J-sNtrtkCZvSyHKGGJ0VmgVEMd4Km-hJiwbFrBlEUEoL48tFMQhAWKCS3owFWPwG8C0cPVQkjaZqOudrriB3lDTPVTyv8fIO8i_g5OnFbCtMC59oBhacjBWMQbkwm9zJ)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We’re counting on you to join our cause.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d6c3bcb38714c869d8ea3b830ef89bf&_e=IxyeIAH6eZUveXC2i29vweMioy7cSwfqgILad163zv5ShpUOoiVIcEqX9HH4eegTEp6WiyJ5fM-jPQkuWtSoIqMRr5Qn9GmDx7SMaYYLEaXlTtl965V4yT4SuOQ250Dhmo44OBZjijLxW-uKEVFDd-npH6GgM7uGbTxlsYgBjRjfTw4iT2NYHaq-mzDPmwtj4bxdOR85K8MiUg_CqETblnkxHccgR2G_UL9KD2uK3KHOMNmqTH6Fl0h3hUE1OcIFhpWu8M5JHSgnPcvAw6i5WTXxsbQBxIuTa4DyZT1oUI8sQu74PuNsZZ52TrxvhUHMKLj2eetyQt3WjrD8GmHoydJN-O86LgR1s97llp4EDGKt7f3zCgQyx_Sz-PfZwBzDnW0lpcKXm-Pytq8qaTQSL4PLEFPibftTKw3vHqnvxnRHLYNE3UN3smAk2CTMU077FbdrHupOxXZrO6LXrdSAWYchpmxzCzdO5RIJKFaOC281wzakVR8dVpBpOeYzcl5y)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d6c3bcb38714c869d8ea3b830ef89bf&_e=IxyeIAH6eZUveXC2i29vweMioy7cSwfqgILad163zv5ShpUOoiVIcEqX9HH4eegTEp6WiyJ5fM-jPQkuWtSoIqMRr5Qn9GmDx7SMaYYLEaXlTtl965V4yT4SuOQ250Dhmo44OBZjijLxW-uKEVFDd-npH6GgM7uGbTxlsYgBjRjfTw4iT2NYHaq-mzDPmwtj4bxdOR85K8MiUg_CqETblnkxHccgR2G_UL9KD2uK3KHOMNmqTH6Fl0h3hUE1OcIFhpWu8M5JHSgnPcvAw6i5WYwD7psC7-MzmWCVXEFpULcohbmKiBwr5zj-lk2lqIscet4dQGPlu5DsZrpEn8jxYoxn5bXeL8HmCdxfZ7LZpLvSvesUnbLrsMS-sZkn4zpMx3j6S4kmTcAMJ9D5SGtKZ4umBG5bQz6yhuHzcZHPjFDYSpNOZcqRphuHI5c5UGXjCK2ZqSIzpSKoH_Z6XYkD1SE3B_phpx7sXs2E3yJKpkSzqJLKEtiAysWtYjUcZWBi)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d6c3bcb38714c869d8ea3b830ef89bf&_e=IxyeIAH6eZUveXC2i29vweMioy7cSwfqgILad163zv5ShpUOoiVIcEqX9HH4eegTEp6WiyJ5fM-jPQkuWtSoIqMRr5Qn9GmDx7SMaYYLEaXlTtl965V4yT4SuOQ250Dhmo44OBZjijLxW-uKEVFDd-npH6GgM7uGbTxlsYgBjRjfTw4iT2NYHaq-mzDPmwtj4bxdOR85K8MiUg_CqETblnkxHccgR2G_UL9KD2uK3KHOMNmqTH6Fl0h3hUE1OcIFhpWu8M5JHSgnPcvAw6i5Wf-FGx454zbN7wtT3JMT6iRF99W-lH7tRYTzUNHT-f1lZrNC1K2JhKVUQ1IqZLI3VDZj1i9oTDzjXrF66_BnFCVRKdWHxrwPzcgLDLyD0A5jkFzZpzG270WLnfPuxES7PLWBXWWLVTDBh0TjqA4YY2fMjCXCj4crhoAuRr0Iuwm4c4RitPByPzybWjnYky3hGp20NW1gx-nAcc4nAJfHe3zACzZNohA4zcaWVjagbCVX)
Jim Jordan

We have ONE day until the State of the Union Address and so far have collected 78,882 signatures of our 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 10,500 patriots to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal. Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline. The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. . We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House. Thank you for your support. For freedom, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015 Don't want to receive any more of our emails?
